  "findings": [
    "Bolts are only snug-tightened where fully pretensioned joints are specified by design."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform full pretensioning of the bolts using an approved method (e.g., turn-of-nut, TC bolts, or DTI washers) and inspect to RCSC standards."
  ],
  "rationale": "The RCSC Specification requires that joints designated as pretensioned or slip-critical must be tightened to the minimum specified bolt tension, which is significantly higher than the snug-tight condition observed.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 4.2 and Section 8"
  ]
}
